text: Here's what science actually says about sepsis basics. Sepsis is a life-threatening response to infection. Think of it as the body going into overdrive. Symptoms can escalate quickly—fever, rapid heartbeat, confusion. Ignoring them? Risky. Research shows that early treatment can significantly improve survival rates. Timing is everything. So, if you notice signs of sepsis, act fast! Knowledge could save a life—yours or someone else's. Stay informed. Share this video and help spread awareness about sepsis.
